The '''''Sojourn''''' was a [[Hammerhead-class cruiser|''Hammerhead''-class cruiser]] that served as [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Carth Onasi]]'s [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] in the years following the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Following the [[Skirmish at Peragus II|events]] that saw the destruction of the [[Peragus Mining Facility]], the ''Sojourn'' was deployed to investigate what happened. Later, the vessel fought in the [[Battle of Telos IV]] alongside a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] task force against [[Darth Nihilus]] and his [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] fleet.

==Behind the scenes==
Within the game ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', there are two names given for the ''Sojourn''s class. It is referred to both as a Republic Cruiser and as a Republic Frigate. However, in ''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'', the general class of the vessel is confirmed.

When the player leaves [[Telos IV]] the first time in ''KOTOR 2'' and asks the [[Telos Security Force]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] about the ''Sojourn'', the droid calls it "[[Valiant (Opelle)|''Valiant'']]" while the subtitles call it "''Sojourn''". This might mean that it was originally called the ''Valiant'' but had its name changed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
